assertions.title: Admin can view pseudo transaction records

steps.observed: Login form displayed with email and password fields

steps.expected: Owned assets management page with table of records
steps.observed: Page loaded with title 'Owned Assets Management' and table showing 5 assets with columns: REFERENCE, USER, ITEM NAME, PURCHASE PRICE, QUANTITY, AVAILABLE, STATUS

steps.action: Verify owned asset record data fields
steps.expected: Records with user info, quantity, price, and status
steps.observed: Records show: ASSET-2026-00005 (test@example.com, Jordan VS Argentina, $89.99, qty 1, avail 1, Pending), ASSET-2026-00003 (test@example.com, France National Team #10 Jersey 2026, $34.99, qty 3, avail 3, Confirmed), ASSET-2026-00002 (test@example.com, Taylor Swift: The Eras Tour, $299.99, qty 4, avail 2, Listed), ASSET-2026-00001 (test@example.com, Brazil VS Germany, $120.00, qty 2, avail 2, Delivered)

steps.expected: Listings management page with table of records
steps.observed: Page loaded with title 'Listings Management' and table showing 5 listings with columns: REFERENCE, SELLER, ITEM NAME, ASK PRICE, QUANTITY, STATUS, LISTED

steps.expected: Records with seller, quantity, ask price, and status
steps.observed: Records show: LIST-2026-00005 (test@example.com, Germany Away Kit 2026, $35.00, qty 1, Draft), LIST-2026-00004 (test@example.com, Los Angeles Lakers VS San Antonio Spurs, $145.00, qty 1, Pending Sale), LIST-2026-00001 (test@example.com, Taylor Swift: The Eras Tour, $349.99, qty 2, Active), LIST-2026-00002 (test@example.com, Brazil VS Germany, $150.00, qty 1, Sold)

assertions.title: Admin supports pseudo transaction status filtering

steps.observed: Status Filter dropdown with options: All, Pending, Confirmed, Delivered, Listed, Sold, Cancelled

steps.action: Select 'Pending' from owned assets status filter
steps.expected: Table filters to show only Pending assets
steps.observed: Table filtered from 5 assets to 1 asset. Badge changed to '1 Assets'. Only ASSET-2026-00005 (Jordan VS Argentina, Pending) shown
Status Filter dropdown with options: All, Draft, Active, Pending Sale, Sold, Cancelled, Expired

steps.expected: Table filters to show only Active listings
steps.observed: Table filtered from 5 listings to 1 listing. Badge changed to '1 Listings'. Only LIST-2026-00001 (Taylor Swift: The Eras Tour, Active) shown

evidence.network: Filter applied client-side, no additional network requests needed

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. Both admin pages (Owned Assets and Listings) display pseudo transaction records with meaningful data fields including user/seller, quantity, price, and lifecycle status. Both pages support filtering by lifecycle status via dropdown controls with multiple status options.
